description: A designed graphic with a dark brick-wall background. A white instant-photo frame holds a booking-style portrait of a young man with a goatee and a neck tattoo in a white shirt, captioned 'ATTEMPTED GANG ASSAULT' in handwriting-style text. Below is a 'Worst of the Worst' logo with a 'Buffalo' label and an ICE logo.
notable_text: ATTEMPTED GANG ASSAULT; Worst of the Worst; Buffalo; ICE
